content: Cover page of a report from the State of New York, Department of Public Service - Metropolitan Division, Transit Commission, 270 Madison Avenue, New York City. Title: 'Growth of Passenger Traffic in New York City for the Fiscal Years Ended June 30, 1920 to 1929'. Table of contents lists: I. Summary of Revenue Passengers Carried by All Lines, II. Fares Collected at Stations of Rapid Transit Lines. Handwritten notes indicate permanent loan from Miss Lennon, Room 203, and classification markings 'N.Y.C. J20'.
